name: Adult ADHD Case
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm just literally every way I turn, I'm fucked.
coping_strategies: Avoiding contact with friends and family, sleeping intermittently, trying to catch up on domestic tasks.
situation: Feeling exhausted after attempting to unpack without support from friends. Avoiding contact with friends and the mother.
behavior: Avoidance of social interactions, intermittent sleep, financial mismanagement.
